mechanism_narrative: Steady month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls signals persistent consumer income expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window when PAYEMS is increasing, or positive return hit rate falls under 52%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the unemployment rate below 5.0% signals a tight labor market that increases wage pressure and forward Fed tightening risk, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Negative 60d returns occur in fewer than 40% of instances when UNRATE is below 5.0%, or the Rank IC is greater than -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Joint acceleration in CPIAUCSL and contraction in INDPRO creates a stagflationary margin squeeze that predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In periods where CPIAUCSL rises month-over-month and INDPRO declines, S&P 500 20d returns are positive more than 50% of the time, or the interaction Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is below 1%, month-over-month growth in retail sales signals demand-driven earnings expansion that produces strongly positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth in FEDFUNDS below 1% periods does not produce significantly higher 5-day returns than in high-rate periods, t-test p > 0.05, or positive hit rate < 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in industrial production signals improving corporate operating leverage and capacity utilization, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO accelerations are not followed by positive 20d returns in at least 55% of instances over a 3-year rolling window, or Rank IC drops below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in housing starts below 1.1 million units annualized signals weakening construction activity and durable goods demand, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST below 1100 fails to coincide with negative 60d returns in more than 45% of triggered instances, or Rank IC is greater than -0.02.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising unemployment and falling retail sales creates a double-dip demand shock that drives negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint month-over-month rises in UNRATE and declines in RSAFS fail to produce negative 5d returns in more than 50% of cases, or interaction Rank IC is below 0.04.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP confirms broad-based aggregate demand expansion, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth is followed by negative 60d returns in more than 45% of observations, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 5-year window.
